\tzpentry{ID3445}{Partial Eigenvalue Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3445 introduces Partial Eigenvalue Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\partial_t n = \\lambda - \\Gamma n + D_n \\nabla^2 n.$$
